title: Add ACP preview manifest and stdio handshake
goal: Implement the first issue #3 ACP slice: an offline ACP manifest plus a minimal JSON-RPC-over-stdio initialize/shutdown server for capability negotiation.
requiredInputs: GitHub issue #3 ACP server and registry path
Existing issue #4 headless session envelopes as advertised capabilities
permissions: Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: `jcode-harness acp manifest --json` emits a stable offline preview manifest
`jcode-harness acp serve --stdio` handles JSON-RPC initialize and shutdown over newline-delimited stdio
Unsupported methods return JSON-RPC method-not-found errors without panicking
Focused e2e, fmt/check, selfdev build, commit and push pass
failureTaxonomy: Blocking forever in tests due to stdio protocol loop
Claiming full ACP registry compliance before implemented
notes: Keep this as a preview handshake slice. Do not claim registry-ready/full ACP until session/tool/cancel semantics are implemented and reviewed.
